title: Huawei EchoLife EG8145V5 GPON ONT Gateway, WiFi 5
description: The EchoLife EG8145V5 is a intelligent routing-type Optical Network Terminal (ONT) in Huawei FTTH solution. By using the GPON technology, ultra-broadband access is provided for home users. The EG8145V5 supports 802.11ac dual-frequency bands and features high-performance forwarding capabilities to ensure an excellent experience with voice, Internet, and HD video services. These features make the EG8145V5 a perfect option for broadband access GPON ONT Gateway with WiFi 5 support (802.11a/b/g/n/ac) with max. modulation speed 300/867Mbps . It is equipped with 4x GLAN ports . 1x USB 2.0 (FTP, SAMBA, DLNA support) and 1x POTS port for analog phone line. The GPON port for connecting an optical cable with a SC/APC connector is ingeniously hidden on the bottom of the device Device comes from official Czech distribution Configurations are automatically delivered by the network management system so on-site commissioning is not required Device DC Power adapter
